name: Piquant Popcorn
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2-inch piece ginger root, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a saucepan.
2. Add 1 clove of crushed garlic, ginger, and popping corn. Stir well.
3. Cover and cook over medium-high heat for 3-5 minutes, holding the lid firmly and shaking the pan frequently until popping stops.
4. Turn popped corn onto a dish, discarding any unpopped corn kernels.
5. Melt butter in the pan.
6. Stir in the remaining clove of crushed garlic and chili sauce.
7. Return corn to the pan and toss well until evenly coated with the mixture.
8. Add parsley and salt; stir well.
9. Turn into a serving dish. Serve warm or cold.
VARIATION: Omit chili sauce and add 1 teaspoon dry mustard, 1 teaspoon paprika, 1/2 teaspoon ground coriander, and 2 tablespoons chopped fresh chives to the melted butter.
